channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 23rd March
item.description:
CW: Pothole (Patch Required) 700mmx600mmx54mm TM: Traffic lights Stats required Opposite Sunnyside (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 23rd March
item.description:
The tree has previously been inspected by the Council, on a few occasions over the last 2 or 3 years - following tree limbs dropping to the ground above the pavement, road and neighbouring garden, and was deemed safe after each occasion. However, since the last inspection, the condition of the tree has significantly deteriorated. A substantial crack has now appeared running down a section of the trunk, and the tree recently dropped another branch on to the neighbouring garden. This is causing increasing concern among residents, particularly due to the risk of falling debris and the potential for the tree to fail entirely. We are worried that this could result in injury to pedestrians or damage to nearby properties if not addressed promptly.Given the visible change in the tree’s condition, we would be grateful if the Council could arrange for an urgent reinspection and take any necessary action to ensure public safety. Thank you for your attention to this matter. We look forward to your prompt response.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 23rd March
item.description:
Pothole on the roundabout with a sharp edge.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous / sharp metal protruding from pavement, 23rd March
item.description:
Corner of imperial square pavement. A pole / post has been removed but has been finished poorly and has left very sharp metal sticking out of the ground. This is a trip / fall hazard and a fall on top of this would cause a nasty injury.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Trafalgar Street, Montpellier, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 23rd March
item.description:
28 day with 4 way traffic lights plus temp fway closure lift and relay rocking dropped kerb 900x100x30mm STATS (CW Edge Kerbing & Channels)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose and annoying when hit by heavy vehicles..., 23rd March
item.description:
Hi, I know there is work going to be carried out in April 17th but that is a month down the road. It has been inspected apparently and not of your criteria??? Its keeping me up at night. I would like it looked at again and atleast something done to stop the big sound amplified when lorries and HGV vehicles hit it.... its not on and for another month is just not acceptable... come and sit in my room and listen to it... over 3 months plus ive had to put up with this....
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 396a, Gloucester Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
